channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Neil Young redid two songs he wrote as a teenager. Listen …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:

Neil Young redid two songs he wrote as a teenager.

item.title: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without chil…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without children or a spouse. An expert says this is "a reality to be supported" rather than a crisis to be solved. n.pr/4eVivm8
item.content:encoded: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without children or a spouse. An expert says this is "a reality to be supported" rather than a crisis to be solved. n.pr/4eVivm8

item.title: My Chemical Romance Bring Wembley Stadium to Its Knees With …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
My Chemical Romance Bring Wembley Stadium to Its Knees With ‘Black Parade’ Show

Almost 20 years after the album first marched into fans' bleeding hearts, My Chemical Romance prove they aren’t just on a nostalgia trip.

Live Review: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
My Chemical Romance Bring Wembley Stadium to Its Knees With ‘Black Parade’ Show

Almost 20 years after the album first marched into fans' bleeding hearts, My Chemical Romance prove they aren’t just on a nostalgia trip.

Live Review: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Canoeist David Hearn plead not guilty in D.C. Superior Court…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Canoeist David Hearn plead not guilty in D.C. Superior Court Thursday to a charge of destruction of property causing more than $1,000 in damage to the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool. n.pr/4f7tis7
item.content:encoded: Canoeist David Hearn plead not guilty in D.C. Superior Court Thursday to a charge of destruction of property causing more than $1,000 in damage to the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool. n.pr/4f7tis7

item.title: How Stephen Root Became the Greatest Character Actor of Our …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
How Stephen Root Became the Greatest Character Actor of Our Time

From Milton in 'Office Space' to his latest role as Wyck on 'Widow’s Bay,' he finds the humanity in outcasts and oddballs, then slips back into anonymity.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv...
item.content:encoded:
How Stephen Root Became the Greatest Character Actor of Our Time

From Milton in 'Office Space' to his latest role as Wyck on 'Widow’s Bay,' he finds the humanity in outcasts and oddballs, then slips back into anonymity.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv...

item.title: President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrai…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and saying that the U.S. will give Ukraine a license to make Patriot air defense systems. n.pr/4vUzbzW
item.content:encoded: President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and saying that the U.S. will give Ukraine a license to make Patriot air defense systems. n.pr/4vUzbzW

item.title: Franky Rizardo has pulled out of a collaborative remix with …
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: Franky Rizardo has pulled out of a collaborative remix with Pete Tong after the BBC Radio 1 broadcaster was accused by John Summit of stealing the track
item.content:encoded: Franky Rizardo has pulled out of a collaborative remix with Pete Tong after the BBC Radio 1 broadcaster was accused by John Summit of stealing the track

item.title: Justin Baldoni has issued his first public statement in near…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Justin Baldoni has issued his first public statement in nearly two years after his 'It Ends With Us' lawsuit with Blake Lively ended in a settlement.

Read ↓
item.content:encoded:

item.title: How Sunflower Bean’s Nick Kivlen Found a Mellow Psychedelic …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
How Sunflower Bean’s Nick Kivlen Found a Mellow Psychedelic Groove of His Own

The guitarist tells us about finding his voice and going DIY for his great new solo debut, 'Addicted to the Sunset.'

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
How Sunflower Bean’s Nick Kivlen Found a Mellow Psychedelic Groove of His Own

The guitarist tells us about finding his voice and going DIY for his great new solo debut, 'Addicted to the Sunset.'

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: At a surprise acoustic performance in London, Mick Jagger an…

item.title: Former strength and conditioning coach Mark Kulbis was charg…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Former strength and conditioning coach Mark Kulbis was charged Monday in the death of Calvin "CJ" Dickey Jr., a freshman athlete with sickle-cell trait who collapsed during training in July 2024. n.pr/4vnAMNP
item.content:encoded: Former strength and conditioning coach Mark Kulbis was charged Monday in the death of Calvin "CJ" Dickey Jr., a freshman athlete with sickle-cell trait who collapsed during training in July 2024. n.pr/4vnAMNP

item.title: A Kennedy Center worker details Trump's disastrous takeover …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
A Kennedy Center worker details Trump's disastrous takeover from the inside.

“Now there’s an atmosphere that’s really depressing. Everything that happened after Trump decided to take over was horrible.”

Story: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
A Kennedy Center worker details Trump's disastrous takeover from the inside.

“Now there’s an atmosphere that’s really depressing. Everything that happened after Trump decided to take over was horrible.”

Story: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Democrat Graham Platner ended his bid last night for U.S. Se…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Democrat Graham Platner ended his bid last night for U.S. Senate. And, prominent civil rights attorney Ben Crump has been enlisted to help get answers in the July Fourth weekend death of Nolan Wells. n.pr/44YW3Ct
item.content:encoded: Democrat Graham Platner ended his bid last night for U.S. Senate. And, prominent civil rights attorney Ben Crump has been enlisted to help get answers in the July Fourth weekend death of Nolan Wells. n.pr/44YW3Ct

item.title: Invoking one of competitive calisthenics’ venerable athletes…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Invoking one of competitive calisthenics’ venerable athletes and promoters, Sean “Doc” Peterson, Abu Asada says: “This is the most physical thing you’re gonna see people do without being violent.”

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
Invoking one of competitive calisthenics’ venerable athletes and promoters, Sean “Doc” Peterson, Abu Asada says: “This is the most physical thing you’re gonna see people do without being violent.”

item.title: In the occupied West Bank, Israeli settlers keep seizing lan…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In the occupied West Bank, Israeli settlers keep seizing land in areas where Palestinians have lived for generations. The conflict even reaches caves in remote corners of the territory. n.pr/4f8EV1S
item.content:encoded: In the occupied West Bank, Israeli settlers keep seizing land in areas where Palestinians have lived for generations. The conflict even reaches caves in remote corners of the territory. n.pr/4f8EV1S

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: “The first time I saw one of Abu Asada’s underground battle …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
“The first time I saw one of Abu Asada’s underground battle clips, in 2024, it hit me with the force of a thunderbolt. Men of all shades and sizes testing themselves in a furnace of pain, iron sharpening iron,” writes Jason Motlagh.

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
“The first time I saw one of Abu Asada’s underground battle clips, in 2024, it hit me with the force of a thunderbolt. Men of all shades and sizes testing themselves in a furnace of pain, iron sharpening iron,” writes Jason Motlagh.

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: Remembering Bonnie Tyler, the Welsh singer whose husky, comm…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description:
Remembering Bonnie Tyler, the Welsh singer whose husky, commanding voice gave the world classic hits like "Total Eclipse of the Heart," "Holding Out for a Hero," "It’s a Heartache," and more.

Tyler was 75.
item.content:encoded:
Remembering Bonnie Tyler, the Welsh singer whose husky, commanding voice gave the world classic hits like "Total Eclipse of the Heart," "Holding Out for a Hero," "It’s a Heartache," and more.

Tyler was 75.

item.title: Although several women watch, the battle events are unapolog…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Although several women watch, the battle events are unapologetically hypermasculine. Abu Asada says that men have become “weak” and “distracted,” going to the gym to preen and ogle women, driven by vanity and lust rather than self-betterment.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
Although several women watch, the battle events are unapologetically hypermasculine. Abu Asada says that men have become “weak” and “distracted,” going to the gym to preen and ogle women, driven by vanity and lust rather than self-betterment.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: With the sport still in its nascency and no supreme governin…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
With the sport still in its nascency and no supreme governing body, the rules and routines to be completed in calisthenics battles vary. Sometimes there is prize money at stake, but more frequently, the battles are just for hard-won pride.

Story: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
With the sport still in its nascency and no supreme governing body, the rules and routines to be completed in calisthenics battles vary. Sometimes there is prize money at stake, but more frequently, the battles are just for hard-won pride.

Story: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: The new round of bombing in the Middle East has underscored …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The new round of bombing in the Middle East has underscored the precarity of relying on fossil fuels. The war is speeding up the global transition to EVs, solar, and batteries, experts say. n.pr/4vlRdKm
item.content:encoded: The new round of bombing in the Middle East has underscored the precarity of relying on fossil fuels. The war is speeding up the global transition to EVs, solar, and batteries, experts say. n.pr/4vlRdKm

item.title: Abu Asada hosts and competes in calisthenics competitions. …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Abu Asada hosts and competes in calisthenics competitions.

“We come out here, talk some junk, slap each other up, but it’s good,” says Adrian Melo, one of Abu Asada’s top competitive calisthenics students. “We need this as men.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
Abu Asada hosts and competes in calisthenics competitions.

“We come out here, talk some junk, slap each other up, but it’s good,” says Adrian Melo, one of Abu Asada’s top competitive calisthenics students. “We need this as men.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: Competitive calisthenics disciplines span endurance, freesty…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Competitive calisthenics disciplines span endurance, freestyle, and streetlifting, an increasingly popular format in which athletes try to lift maximum weight while wearing plates attached to a belt.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
Competitive calisthenics disciplines span endurance, freestyle, and streetlifting, an increasingly popular format in which athletes try to lift maximum weight while wearing plates attached to a belt.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: America’s Toughest Workout Isn’t in a Gym — It’s on the Stre…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
America’s Toughest Workout Isn’t in a Gym — It’s on the Street

In cities across the country, underground calisthenics battles are pushing elite athletes to their limits.

Story: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
America’s Toughest Workout Isn’t in a Gym — It’s on the Street

In cities across the country, underground calisthenics battles are pushing elite athletes to their limits.

Story: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an o…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again. n.pr/3SRKdYe
item.content:encoded: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again. n.pr/3SRKdYe

item.title: As mayor of Manchester, Andy Burnham brought growth to the p…

item.description: As mayor of Manchester, Andy Burnham brought growth to the postindustrial city. Can he scale that nationally as the next prime minister? n.pr/4pahPg7

item.title: 「STAR」でディズニーソングSP 佐野勇斗、佐野晶哉、髙塚大夢、 佐藤大樹、増田貴久らが名曲セレクト⭐️ htt…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
「STAR」でディズニーソングSP
佐野勇斗、佐野晶哉、髙塚大夢、
佐藤大樹、増田貴久らが名曲セレクト⭐️
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680053?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

京本大我×昆夏美、生田絵梨花×Matt
コラボパフォーマンスも紹介✨️

#STARスター
item.content:encoded:
「STAR」でディズニーソングSP
佐野勇斗、佐野晶哉、髙塚大夢、
佐藤大樹、増田貴久らが名曲セレクト⭐️
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680053?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

京本大我×昆夏美、生田絵梨花×Matt
コラボパフォーマンスも紹介✨️

#STARスター

item.title: 森山直太朗がトンツカタンへ贈る 「愛々」特別ムービー公開 https://natalie.mu/music/news…
